<Meta title="Primitives / Dialog" />

# Dialog

A window overlaid on either the primary window or another dialog window, rendering the content underneath inert.

## Usage

We don't have a styled, project-agnostic Dialog component in Fusion yet. We simply re-export [Radix UI's Dialog](https://www.radix-ui.com/primitives/docs/components/dialog) to make it easy for consuming applications to build their own.
